pageContext.name: Elvis Presley (Vegas Edition)
pageContext.description: A live concert to me is exciting because of all the electricity that is generated in the crowd and on stage. It's my favorite part of the business.   Sideshow and Iconiq Studios are honored to present the second entry in the 1/6th scale Legends Series, the King of Rock and Roll himself: Elvis Presley (Vegas edition).  Featuring the iconic White Concho Jumpsuit from his famous Las Vegas performance, two authentic hand-sculpted heads, a fully articulated body, his guitar and mic, and more.
